full_text:
Cao Jun (Zi’an) 曹峻 (子安)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Jun (曹峻), styledZi’an (子安). Son of Cao Cao, did nothing notable. Cao Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
